content.text:
## Goal
Full sitrep of ~/job-copilot codebase.

## Steps
- Step 1: Top-level directory structure (ls -la)
- Step 2: Git status, branch, recent commits, uncommitted changes
- Step 3: README, package.json, config files
- Step 4: Key source files and purposes
- Step 5: Tests present and status
- Step 6: Lint/typecheck config and status
- Step 7: Build artifacts, CI, deployment
- Step 8: Open issues/todos in codebase
- Step 9: Dependencies
- Step 10: Overall health assessment## Files Found

```
~/job-copilot/
├── AGENTS.md                     — Agent contract, architecture, commands
├── README.md                     — Project readme
├── package.json                  — npm config (vitest, playwright, chrome-launcher, pdfjs-dist)
├── vitest.config.js              — Vitest config (jsdom env, tests/**/*.test.js)
├── FILETREE.md                   — Auto-maintained file tree with hashes
├── ARCHITECTURE_VISUAL.html      — Interactive architecture diagram
├── LICENSE                       — MIT
├── .gitignore
├── extension/                    — Chrome extension (MV3)
│   ├── manifest.json
│   ├── content/
│   │   ├── content.js            — Orchestrator: panel UI, Fill All, learning, SPA observer
│   │   ├── form-detector.js      — Engine: field detection, fill routing, Oracle combobox strategies
│   │   └── content.css           — Injected styles
│   ├── background/background.js  — Service worker: PDF extraction, LLM profile extraction
│   ├── lib/
│   │   ├── llm-client.js         — OpenAI-compatible API wrapper
│   │   ├── token-tracker.js      — LLM token usage tracking
│   │   ├── pdf-extract.js        — PDF text extraction via pdf.js
│   │   └── pdfjs/                — Bundled pdf.js (min.mjs + worker)
│   ├── options/                  — Settings page (resume upload, LLM config, profile edit)
│   ├── popup/                    — Popup UI (field counts, Fill All, Clear All)
│   └── icons/                    — Extension icons
├── scripts/
│   ├── keep_alive.mjs            — Chrome launcher via Playwright
│   ├── reload_extension.mjs      — Hot reload helper
│   └── test/                     — 24 test/debug scripts (fill, inspect, clear, trace, etc.)
├── test/                         — Legacy test suite (30+ test files)
├── tests/                        — Active unit tests (vitest)
│   └── matching-priority.test.js — Select/combobox matching priority tests
├── docs/
│   ├── index.html                — CDC CLI docs
│   └── research.md               — Oracle CX / Knockout.js research notes
├── handoff/                      — Session handoffs (7 files) + audit doc
├── check_ko.js                   — Throwaway Knockout debug script (untracked)
├── click_next.js                 — Throwaway page navigation debug script (untracked)
├── deep_inspect.js               — Throwaway DOM inspection script (untracked)
├── test_extract.py               — Python resume extraction script
└── test-results/                 — Playwright test output artifacts
```

## Key Code

**Architecture:** Chrome MV3 extension. Content script (`content.js`) orchestrates field detection via `form-detector.js` (pure engine), which identifies form fields using weighted word-boundary regex scoring. Fill routes: `<select>` → 4-phase option matching, Oracle comboboxes → 4-strategy chain (toggle click → paste → char-by-char → fallback), text inputs → paste with native setter. LLM client in `llm-client.js` talks to any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Background worker handles PDF extraction (pdf.js) + LLM profile extraction. Learning system saves user corrections to `chrome.storage.sync` and applies on subsequent fills.

**Field identification:** Reads label text (weight 4), autocomplete (3), aria-label (2), name/id/placeholder (1). Each pattern tested with `\bword\b` regex. Score = weight×100 + pattern length.

**Fill strategies:**
- `<select>`: exact → word-boundary → startsWith → includes
- Oracle combobox (toggle-button): click toggle → poll aria-expanded → wait for listbox → find option → click. Falls back paste → char-by-char.
- Text inputs: native value setter → InputEvent paste → char-by-char
- Oracle React buttons: PointerEvent + mousedown+mouseup+click (synthetic click() doesn't work)

## Dependencies

**package.json:**
- `chrome-launcher` ^1.2.1 — Chrome process management
- `pdfjs-dist` ^5.7.284 — PDF parsing
- `playwright` ^1.60.0 (dev) — E2E testing / Chrome control
- `vitest` ^4.1.8 (dev) — Unit test runner
- `jsdom` ^29.1.1 (dev) — DOM simulation
- `ws` ^8.21.0 (dev) — WebSocket (for CDP bridge)

**External tools (not npm):** `cdc` (~/tools/chrome-cdp/) — project-agnostic Chrome DevTools CLI

## Tests

**Unit tests (vitest, 1 file, 17 tests):** `tests/matching-priority.test.js` tests select/combobox matching priority (exact > word-boundary > startsWith > includes). **All 17 pass.**

**Syntax check (6 files):** `test/syntax_check.mjs` — **All 6 pass** (llm-client.js, content.js, form-detector.js, popup.js, options.js, background.js).

**Legacy test suite (30+ files in `test/`):** Covers PDF extraction, form detection, integration, models, tokens, E2E. May have varying status — not run recently.

**Test scripts (24 in `scripts/test/`):** Interactive debugging tools (fill, inspect, clear, trace, screenshot, storage dump, combobox tests). Designed to run against live Chrome via Playwright/CDP.

## Lint/Typecheck

- **No eslint, no prettier, no tsconfig.** Zero static analysis tooling.
- Only syntax check via `node -c` / `new Function()` in `test/syntax_check.mjs`.
- Type system: None (plain JS, no JSDoc types enforced).

## Build/CI/Deployment

- **No CI/CD config** — no .github, .circleci, Dockerfile, or CI scripts
- **No build step** — extension is loaded unpacked in Chrome dev mode
- **No deployment setup** — distributed via loading unpacked extension
- **No package** — not on Chrome Web Store

## Open Issues/TODOs (from codebase + handoff)

**Bugs from AUDIT-2026-06-06 (15 documented bugs):**
1. Combobox typeahead confirmation — aria-expanded check added but untested
2. City field fill fails "ALL strategies failed"
3. Education level dropdown mapping (degree values mismatch)
4. Education date fields not filling
5. Experience — only 1 entry added ("No Add Experience trigger")
6. Skills typeahead wrong match ("GUI" → "Strategic Guidance") — **FIXED in last commit**
7. ISAE-SUPAERO school not in Oracle dropdown
8. Learned-field pollution (addressLine1="Bhalla", addressLine2="91")
9. City = "Wrocław" overwrote "Gdansk"
10-11. addressLine2/region2 from unknown sources
12. Phone country code combobox routing (works ✅)
13. Fill All slow (~90-120s, skills ~75s)
14. Content script isolated world (page.evaluate() can't access content script)
15. JC panel buttons invisible to body scan

**Recently fixed (last 14 commits):**
- Fixes for Bugs #3, #4, #5, #6, #7 (education dropdown/date, experience trigger, skills match, school fallback)
- Combobox timing, aria-expanded check, fillSelect priority ordering

**Uncommitted changes:**
- `AGENTS.md` — updated
- `content.js` — modified (uncommitted)
- `form-detector.js` — modified (uncommitted, partial Bug #1 fix)
- Various untracked throwaway scripts

## Git Status

- **Branch:** main (ahead of origin/main by 14 commits)
- **Recent commits:** Bug fixes for education, experience, skills matching, combobox priority, school fallback
- **Uncommitted:** 3 modified files (AGENTS.md, content.js, form-detector.js), 7 untracked (throwaway scripts, handoff docs, .pi/)

## Overall Health Assessment

**Status: YELLOW** — Functional but fragile.

**Strengths:**
- Clean architecture: pure engine (form-detector.js) separated from orchestrator (content.js), testable
- Comprehensive field detection with weighted scoring
- Multiple fill strategies per field type with graceful fallbacks
- Learning system for corrections
- BYO LLM endpoint — no vendor lock-in
- Good documentation (AGENTS.md, handoffs, architecture diagram)

**Risks:**
- **15 open bugs** in the audit — many partially fixed but untested
- **No CI/linting/typechecking** — code quality unenforced
- **Uncommitted changes** to form-detector.js (partial fix) could cause regressions
- **Large test surface** (30+ test files) but no automated regression suite
- **No automated E2E tests** — scripts require live Chrome + Oracle page
- **Throwaway scripts** (check_ko.js, click_next.js, deep_inspect.js) accumulating in root — should be cleaned up
- **Learning system** has pollution issues (learned incorrect values persisting)
- **No deployment pipeline** — manual reload only

**Next recommended actions:**
1. Commit uncommitted changes (or revert partial fixes that aren't tested)
2. Run Bug #1 through Bug #7 fix verification systematically
3. Clear learned-field pollution (Bug #8)
4. Add eslint + basic type checking
5. Set up CI (GitHub Actions) to run vitest + syntax check on push
6. Clean up throwaway scripts from root and gitignore

content.thinking: The scout has provided a comprehensive sitrep. Let me synthesize this into a concise summary for the user.

content.text:
## Sitrep: ~/job-copilot

### Identity
Chrome MV3 extension for auto-filling job applications. Content script detects form fields via weighted regex scoring, then dispatches field-type-specific fill strategies (select, Oracle combobox, text input, React button). Background worker handles PDF → LLM profile extraction. Optional learning system persists corrections.

### Git Status
- **Branch:** `main` (14 ahead of `origin/main`)
- **Uncommitted:** 3 modified files (`AGENTS.md`, `content.js`, `form-detector.js`) + throwaway scripts + handoff docs
- **Last 14 commits:** Bug fixes for education fields, experience trigger, skills matching, combobox priority, school fallback

### Architecture
```
extension/
├── content/content.js         — Orchestrator: panel, fill routing, learning, SPA observer
├── content/form-detector.js   — Engine: field detection, fill strategies (pure, testable)
├── background/background.js   — Service worker: PDF→LLM extraction
├── lib/llm-client.js           — OpenAI-compatible API wrapper
├── lib/pdf-extract.js         — PDF text extraction (pdf.js)
├── options/                   — Settings page
└── popup/                     — Quick controls
```

Field scoring: `label(4x) > autocomplete(3x) > aria-label(2x) > name/id/placeholder(1x)` with `\bword\b` regex patterns.

Fill strategies chain: exact match → word-boundary → startsWith → includes. Oracle comboboxes use toggle-click → paste → char-by-char → fallback. React buttons use PointerEvent (synthetic click() doesn't work).

### Test & Quality
| Area | Status |
|------|--------|
| Unit tests (vitest) | **17/17 pass** — matching priority |
| Syntax checks | **6/6 pass** — all source files |
| Legacy tests (30+ files) | Not recently run |
| Linting | **None** — no eslint, prettier, or type checking |
| CI/CD | **None** — no GitHub Actions, no deployment pipeline |

### Open Bug Load — 15 documented

| # | Issue | Status |
|---|-------|--------|
| 1 | Combobox typeahead confirmation | Partial fix, untested |
| 2 | City field: "ALL strategies failed" | **Open** |
| 3 | Education level dropdown mapping | Fixed |
| 4 | Education date fields not filling | Fixed |
| 5 | Experience: only 1 entry added | Fixed |
| 6 | Skills: wrong match "GUI" → "Strategic Guidance" | Fixed |
| 7 | ISAE-SUPAERO school not in dropdown | Fixed |
| 8 | Learned-field pollution (addressLine1="Bhalla") | **Open** |
| 9 | City "Wrocław" overwrote "Gdansk" | **Open** |
| 10-11 | addressLine2/region2 from unknown sources | **Open** |
| 12 | Phone country code combobox | Working ✅ |
| 13 | Fill All slow (~90-120s) | **Open** |
| 14 | Isolated world can't reach content script | **Open** |
| 15 | JC panel buttons invisible to body scan | **Open** |

### Health: YELLOW 🟡

**Strong:** Clean engine/orchestrator separation, multi-strategy fill, BYO LLM, good docs (AGENTS.md, handoffs, architecture diagram).

**Fragile:** No static analysis, no CI, uncommitted partial fixes that could regress, accumulated throwaway scripts in root, learning system has data pollution bugs, and 8 of 15 audit bugs remain open or untested.

**Highest-leverage next step:** Commit or revert the partial fixes, add eslint, and set up GH Actions to run vitest + syntax check on push.
